seoTitle: Toowong vs Top Camp — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Toowong and Top Camp. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Toowong vs Top Camp: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Toowong and Top Camp.
heading: Toowong vs Top Camp — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Toowong, Queensland and Top Camp, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Toowong has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Top Camp (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Toowong or Top Camp safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Toowong has a flood risk score of 42/100, while Top Camp scores 55/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Toowong scores 24/100 for bushfire risk. Top Camp scores 54/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Toowong or Top Camp?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Toowong has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
